command:
echo "=== CLOUDFLARED on vm-claude-hub (.191) ==="
echo "--- service status ---"
systemctl is-active cloudflared 2>/dev/null
systemctl is-enabled cloudflared 2>/dev/null
echo "--- how is it installed? (token mode?) ---"
sudo systemctl cat cloudflared 2>/dev/null | grep -E "ExecStart|tunnel run" | head -3
echo "--- cloudflared version ---"
cloudflared --version 2>/dev/null
echo "--- tunnel token mode files ---"
ls -la /etc/cloudflared/ 2>/dev/null
echo "--- tunnel list ---"
cloudflared tunnel list 2>/dev/null | head -10
echo ""
echo "=== Resource load on .191 (the overloaded VM) ==="
echo "--- memory ---"
free -h | head -2
echo "--- load avg ---"
uptime
echo "--- top processes by mem ---"
ps aux --sort=-%mem | head -8 | awk '{print $4"%", $11, $12}'
echo ""
echo "=== UPTIME KUMA on vm-dashboard (.201) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 \
  "systemctl is-active uptime-kuma 2>/dev/null || docker ps --filter name=uptime --format '{{.Names}} {{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null; echo '--- port 3010 ---'; ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 3010 || sudo ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 3010"
